title: Pan-Seared Fish with Thai Basil and Chilies
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring tender fish, rich Thai basil, and a spicy kick. This recipe is quick to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: 1. Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add fish fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Add Thai basil and chilies to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Serve fish immediately, garnished with additional Thai basil if desired.
